titleStmt.title: SII 30.171: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 171. (A.R. No. 249 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple: on the south wall Rājādhirāja-Chōḻa I: year 32: 1050 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged and Incomplete. Begins with the praśasti of the king ‘tiṅgaḷēr peṟa vaḷar’ etc. It seems to record a meeting of the members of the sabhā at the temple of Śri Pōndai-āḻvār and also refers to the burning of lamp before Sapthamātrukas by Ādittakramavittaṉ, Tiruvēgambakramavittaṉ and Mādhavakramavittaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷerpeṟa vaḷaraṅkatirk kaṭavuṭṭolkulam viḷaṅkat toṉṟi vaṭaticai kaṅkaiyun teṉṟicai Ilaṅkaiyum kuṇaticaik kaṭāramum kuṭaticai makotaiyun taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa tātai taṉ veṇkuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ taṉkuṭai niḻaṟṟi ticaitoṟuñ ceṅkol naṭāttit tikaimuṭi
ṭṭaraicaik c(o)ṇāṭṭotukkip pūvakattaraicaic cevakantulaittu velaikeḻu kān=taḷurccālai kalamaṟuppittu(kkeḻu) jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻaneṉ matikeḻu kovirāja[kesa]ri[panmarāna] Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattiraṇṭu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalat
pperumakkaḷom Emmūr tiruppontai Āḻvār koyilile kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu sabhaiyuḷḷeḻu kuṇṭūr mātavak kiramavittaṉum komaṅkalattu Ātitta kramavittaṉum Eyiṟ tiruvekampakramavittaṉum paṇippaṇiyāl nammūr saptamātirukkaḷukku muṉpu tiruvi
Digital edition of SII 30.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
